stemHtml: Under FIS with a single radio, you need to contact another station for an ATC clearance. What phraseology should you use?

options.a: G-ACZG, changing to ONE TWO FIVE POINT SEVEN SEVEN FIVE.
options.b: G-ACZG, request contact ONE TWO FIVE POINT SEVEN SEVEN FIVE.
options.c: G-ACZG, request monitor ONE TWO FIVE DECIMAL SEVEN SEVEN FIVE.
options.d: G-ACZG, request change to ONE TWO FIVE DECIMAL SEVEN SEVEN FIVE.
